mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN content LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, created_at DESC
